title: paspalum distachyon
intro: Paspalum distachyon, also known as brachiaria distachya, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Paspalum distachyon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and ease congestion. It is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried leaves and stems being steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
